text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At our strategy meeting for the coming year,
Curren Chan shows me several Umamusume social
media stars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The superhero UmaToker, Biko Pegasus. The food
Umastagrammer, Hishi Akebono.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The daily vlog UmaTuber, Taiki Shuttle. And the
class representative, Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of them are sprinters. Curren Chan needs to
compete with all of them next year, and comes up
with a plan to make it happen.
